Degeneracy** — as it appears in quantum measurement (source 5, forcing a choice of projection postulate) and potentially in the "stereotyped states" of the non-Markovian sequence (source 6/7). Investigating degeneracy's role in both the openness of the linear map (quantum) and the compression function's ability to preserve correlations could bridge the structural link.
